title: Tomato and Blue Cheese Tart
excerpt: Ingredients Pastry 250 ml flour 80 ml butter 45 ml cold water 2,5 ml salt (Or, you can simply buy a packet of frozen 'short crust pastry'.) Filling 2 large tomatoes 185 g blue cheese 90 ml cream Pepper Thyme Olive oil Method Mix all the pastry ingredients together and line …

seo.title: Tomato and Blue Cheese Tart - Marinda Kook

html:
Ingredients

Pastry

  • 250 ml flour
  • 80 ml butter
  • 45 ml cold water
  • 2,5 ml salt
  • (Or, you can simply buy a packet of frozen 'short crust pastry'.)

Filling

  • 2 large tomatoes
  • 185 g blue cheese
  • 90 ml cream
  • Pepper
  • Thyme
  • Olive oil

Method

Mix all the pastry ingredients together and line a loose-bottomed pan with the dough. Place in the fridge and let it rest for 30 minutes. Blind bake the crust at 180 ºC for 15 minutes or until the pastry is done. Then remove the baking paper and the beans/rice you used, and bake for a further 5 minutes until golden brown and crisp. Or prepare the shop-bought pastry as indicated on the packet.

Meanwhile, place the tomatoes in a large bowl, cover with boiling water and let stand for a few minutes. Then peel off the skins and slice the tomatoes.

Place the blue cheese in another mixing bowl, soften it with a fork, and mix in the cream.

When the crust is baked and has cooled, spread the cheese mixture over the pastry base. Layer the tomato slices on top of the cheese, and sprinkle pepper, thyme and olive oil over to taste.

Now bake again at 160 ºC for 20 minutes or until the filling is done.

Serves 4 generous portions as a light meal with a fresh salad.

Easy!
